CVE-2013-4419.title: The guestfish command in libguestfs 1.20.12, 1.22.7, and earlier, ...
CVE-2013-4419.summary: The guestfish command in libguestfs 1.20.12, 1.22.7, and earlier, when using the --remote or --listen option, does not properly check the ownership of /tmp/.guestfish-$UID/ when creating a temporary socket file in this directory, which allows local users to write to the socket and execute arbitrary commands by creating /tmp/.guestfish-$UID/ in advance.

CVE-2022-2211.title: A vulnerability was found in libguestfs. This issue occurs while  ...
CVE-2022-2211.summary: A vulnerability was found in libguestfs. This issue occurs while calculating the greatest possible number of matching keys in the get_keys() function. This flaw leads to a denial of service, either by mistake or malicious actor.
